 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gas","title":"Create README.md for repository","description":"**Details:**
- Comprehensive README covering all aspects of the project
- Quick start guide for users
- Installation instructions (web, CLI, skills)
- Development setup guide
- Architecture overview
- Contributing guidelines link
- About the Author section with ecosystem links

**README Structure:**
```markdown
# JeffreysPrompts.com

> Curated prompts for agentic coding. Browse, copy, install as Claude Code skills.

## Features
- 🔍 Instant search with BM25 ranking
- 📋 One-click copy to clipboard  
- 🛠️ Install as Claude Code skills
- 📦 Prompt bundles for workflows
- 🌐 Works offline (PWA)
- 🤖 CLI tool with JSON output for agents

## Quick Start

### Web
Visit [jeffreysprompts.com](https://jeffreysprompts.com)

### CLI
\`\`\`bash
curl -fsSL https://jeffreysprompts.com/install-cli.sh | bash
jfp list
\`\`\`

### Claude Code Skills
\`\`\`bash
jfp install --all
# or specific prompts
jfp install idea-wizard readme-reviser
\`\`\`

## CLI Usage
[Full command reference]

## Development
[Setup, build, test instructions]

## Architecture  
[Monorepo structure diagram]

## About the Author
Jeffrey Emanuel (@doodlestein)
- jeffreyemanuel.com
- agent-flywheel.com

## License
MIT
```

**Reasoning:** README is the entry point for the repository. Must be comprehensive, scannable, and include quick start paths for different user types (web users, CLI users, developers).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:03.579023587-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:38:16.343765806-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:38:16.343765806-05:00","close_reason":"README.md already exists at 16KB with comprehensive project documentation."}
